column1: I bought a new car ... is very fast.
She lives in New York, ... she likes.
I like the woman ... lives next door.
I live in London, ... has some fantastic parks.
I'm looking for a secretary ... can use a computer well.
She has a son ... is a doctor.
We bought a house ... is 200 years old.
I sent a letter ... arrived three weeks later.
The dog ... owner lives next door is over there.
The little girl ... doll was lost is sad.
I live in the city ... I study.
The bar in Barcelona ... I met my wife is still there.
